channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabweans lured into Russia’s war as families plead for their return
item.description: via Al Jazeera #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera

item.title: Henkel Ventures co-leads Ruka’s $4.5m round
item.description: Ruka, the London-based textured-hair company founded by Zimbabwean entrepreneurs Varaidzo Tendai Moyo and Ugorji Agbai, has closed a $4.5m round co-led by Henkel Ventures and Freedom Trail Capital. The deal, which takes lifetime funding to roughly $10m and brings one of the world via Tendai Kuwanda #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tendai Kuwanda

item.title: Henkel Ventures co-leads Ruka’s $4.5m round
item.description: Ruka, the London-based textured-hair company founded by Zimbabwean entrepreneurs Varaidzo Tendai Moyo and Ugorji Agbai, has closed a $4.5m round co-led by Henkel Ventures and Freedom Trail Capital. item.title: ZimStat evaluates economic performance
item.description: Shamaine Chirimujiri THE Zimbabwe National Statistics Agency (ZimStat), in partnership with the National Competitiveness Commission (NCC), will today commence the National Competitiveness... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and s via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Four Killed After Bus Swerves To Avoid Pedestrian On Harare–Masvingo Road
item.description: Four Dead After Asian Star Bus Overturns Near Mvuma Four people died and four others were injured after an Asian Star bus travelling from Masvingo to Harare collided head-on with a Mercedes-Benz Atego truck along the Harare–Masvingo Road in the early hours of Tuesday morning. The via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Scott Sakupwanya’s Betterbrands Signs US$200k Deal To Revive NASH Sports Programme
item.description: Betterbrands Pumps US$200k Into Zimbabwe School Sports Revival Businessman Scott Sakupwanya’s company Betterbrands has signed a US$200,000 (approximately R3.7 million) partnership with Zimbabwe’s Ministry of Primary and Secondary Education to revive the National Association of Se via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: China tightens grip on Mali, Zimbabwe and Ghana’s lithium as U.S.-linked miner exits Africa’s critical minerals race
item.description: via Business Insider Africa #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: HEXCO records 75% pass rate @bulawayo24
item.description: The Higher Education Examinations Council (HEXCO) has recorded a 75 percent pass rate in the March 2026 examination session, reflecting continued improvement in Zimbabwe’s technical and vocational edu... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: US$40m Cheetos plant boosts Zimbabwe’s manufacturing sector @bulawayo24
item.description: A US$40 million Cheetos manufacturing plant, together with a juice and dairy blending facility, has officially opened in Zimbabwe, in what authorities describe as a major boost to the country’s indust... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Fidelity moves to formalise small-scale gold miners @bulawayo24
item.description: Fidelity Gold Refinery is intensifying efforts to formalise Zimbabwe’s artisanal and small-scale mining sector as part of broader measures aimed at curbing gold leakages and improving transparency wit... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe seeks up to US$200 million in UAE investment for key sectors
item.description: via TV BRICS #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: TV BRICS

item.title: Nurses Carry Our Lives in Their Hands and Must Be Protected, Respected and Empowered @263Chat
item.description: While nurses are often praised as heroes, many continue to work under immense pressure, poor conditions and limited support. The post Nurses Carry Our Lives in Their Hands and Must Be Protected, Respected and Empowered appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: ZDF clarifies Falcon Golf Course status...area gazetted as defence cantonment
item.description: Herald Reporter THE Zimbabwe Defence Forces (ZDF) has clarified that Falcon Golf Course in Hatfield, Harare, has been officially gazetted as a military cantonment area under Statutory Instrument 28 of... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: ZSE Defies Liquidity Slowdown as Blue-Chip Counters Lift All-Share Index @ZSE_ZW
item.description: HARARE – The Zimbabwe Stock Exchange delivered a mixed but resilient performance in April 2026, with gains in the benchmark All-Share Index offsetting a steep decline in market turnover and trading volumes as investor activity softened across the bourse. According to The Herald, via The Zimbabwe Mail #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Shumba Maasai in Venice
item.description: At the 61st Biennale, the Zimbabwean artist’s day-long procession through the city’s campi — performed under the borrowed authority of a Murehwa chief — restages the social-sculpture lineage of Joseph Beuys for a contemporary African discursive practice. via Tendai Kuwanda #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tendai Kuwanda

item.title: Shumba Maasai in Venice
item.description: At the 61st Biennale, the Zimbabwean artist’s day-long procession through the city’s campi — performed under the borrowed authority of a Murehwa chief — restages the social-sculpture lineage of Joseph Beuys for a contemporary African discursive practice. via The Mutapa Times #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
